title: ceanothus guadalupae
intro: Ceanothus guadalupae, also known as Blue Mountain ceanothus or Guadalupe ceanothus, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Ceanothus guadalupae include its potential to treat various ailments such as sore throats, fever, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
